verses.first: Om Jai Shiv Omkara, Swami Jai Shiv Omkara
verses.second: Brahma Vishnu Sadashiv, Ardhangi Dhara || Om Jai Shiv Omkara ||
Hansasan Garudasan Vrishvahan Saje || Om Jai Shiv Omkara ||

verses.first: Do Bhuj Char Chaturbhuj Das Bhuj Ati Sohe
verses.second: Trigun Roop Nirakhte Tribhuvan Jan Mohe || Om Jai Shiv Omkara ||
Chandan Mrigmad Sohai Bhale Shashidhari || Om Jai Shiv Omkara ||
Sankadik Garunadik Bhutadik Sange || Om Jai Shiv Omkara ||

verses.first: Kar Ke Madhya Kamandalu Chakra Trishul Dharta
verses.second: Jagkarta Jagbharta Jag Sanharakarta || Om Jai Shiv Omkara ||
Pranavakshar Mein Shobhit Ye Teeno Eka || Om Jai Shiv Omkara ||

verses.first: Kashi Mein Vishwanath Virajat Nandi Brahmachari
verses.second: Nit Uthi Bhole Darshan Pavat Mahima Ati Bhari || Om Jai Shiv Omkara ||

verses.first: Trigunswami Ji Ki Aarti Jo Koi Nar Gave
verses.second: Kahat Shivanand Swami Manvanchhit Phal Pave || Om Jai Shiv Omkara ||
